title: chrysopsis villosa var. bolanderi
intro: Chrysopsis villosa var. bolanderi, also known as Bolander's goldenaster, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bolander's goldenaster include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural remedy for digestive problems. Bolander's goldenaster can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in herbal remedies for its soothing and calming effects.
